when are the fa cup semi finals played The FA Cup semi-finals are typically held at Old Trafford, the home stadium of Manchester United, with specific dates varying each year but generally scheduled for late February or early March. Old Trafford serves as the neutral venue to accommodate the large number of supporters from both competing teams.
